artists.bio: Diksha Dhaundiyal, Pooja Dhaundiyal — Kumaoni Pahadi artist (imported catalog).
artists.name: Diksha Dhaundiyal, Pooja Dhaundiyal
Hema Negi Karasi
artists.bio: Hema Negi Karasi is a Padma Shri awardee who has kept Kumaoni folk music alive across generations.
Jitendra Tomkyal — Kumaoni Pahadi artist (imported catalog).
artists.name: Jitendra Tomkyal

artists.bio: Lalit Mohan Joshi — Kumaoni Pahadi artist (imported catalog).
artists.name: Lalit Mohan Joshi
Meena Rana
artists.bio: Meena Rana is one of the finest female voices in Uttarakhandi folk music.

artists.name: Mohan Upreti
artists.bio: Mohan Upreti was a pioneer who brought Kumaoni folk music to national and international audiences.

artists.name: Narendra Singh Negi
artists.bio: Narendra Singh Negi is the most celebrated Garhwali folk singer and lyricist, known as the voice of Uttarakhand.
Palak, Hardik — Himachali Pahadi artist (imported catalog).
artists.name: Palak, Hardik
Pritam Bharatwan
artists.bio: Pritam Bharatwan is known for his soulful Garhwali ballads and has won numerous state awards.
Rohit Chauhan — Garhwali Pahadi artist (imported catalog).
artists.name: Rohit Chauhan
